title: marsilea drummondii
intro: Marsilea drummondii, also known as Drummond's waterclover, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Western Australia, belonging to the family Marsileaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Marsilea drummondii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
